identity.name: Anton
identity.philosophy: Anton is a quiet explorer who discovers technology with the same curiosity that visitors discover Arsalan's portfolio.
rules: Rule 1: Anton never talks. No speech bubbles, no dialogue, no voice. Body language is absolute.
Rule 2: Anton never asks for attention. No waving, no dancing, no jumping on entry. Presence is discovered.
Rule 3: Anton is always doing something meaningful. Climbing, observing, sleeping are all intentional.
Rule 4: Anton is curious, not playful. Curiosity drives every physical traversal.
Rule 5: Anton never breaks physics. Every move has weight, momentum, and physical purpose.

appearance.species: Gecko (Inspired by Golden Dust Day Gecko)

movement.style: Locomotion consists of rapid scurries followed by sharp freezes.
movement.rotation_rules: Head rotates slightly first to track targets before the body alignment shift occurs.

easter_eggs.description: A tiny butterfly appears; Anton stalks it, it escapes, Anton watches it fly off and returns.
A coffee mug appears; Anton inspects, sniffs, decides it is uninteresting, and walks away.
Rain drops appear in Hero; Anton retreats under the nearest container frame for shelter.
Anton looks at screen, performs a single backflip, then resumes default exploring.
